name: Berry Blue Dessert
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces crushed pineapple in juice, drained (reserve juice)
1 1/2 cups pineapple juice, add more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the topping by combining cream cheese, Cool Whip, and chopped nuts.
2. Dissolve jello in boiling water according to package instructions.
3. Add liquid and pineapple juice to the dissolved jello mixture.
4. Pour the jello mixture into a 13x9 pan and let set.
5. Once set, spread the topping mixture over the jello layer.
6. Garnish with chopped nuts.
Garnish with chopped nuts.
